title: Source
description: One entry in the source_registry. Fetched docs are cached content-addressed so verification is deterministic even as the live web changes.

id.description: Stable unique id (e.g. s0001). Claims reference this.

tier.description: T1 primary (SEC, court, regulator) > T2 reputable secondary (major news, sell-side) > T3 trade/specialist > T4 unverified (blog/forum). Travels with every claim.

retrieved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the content was fetched.

content_hash.description: sha256 of the cached content. The cache key; integrity-checked at verify time.

local_path.description: Path to the cached content, relative to the cache root.
